name: seameet
description: Record your screen, transcribe meetings, and search AI summaries — controlled by Claude.
long_description: Connects Claude to the SeaMeet desktop app (must be installed and running). Claude can start/stop/pause screen & audio recordings, take screenshots, read the live transcript mid-meeting, retrieve AI artifacts (summaries, transcripts, action items, key decisions, chapters, OCR), search across every recording, and save its own notes back to a recording. Everything stays on your machine: this extension talks to a localhost-only bridge inside the SeaMeet app. Download SeaMeet: https://seameet.ai/download/

tools.name: seameet_stop_recording
tools.description: Stop the active recording and get the saved file path

tools.name: seameet_get_live_transcript
tools.description: Read the live transcript while a recording is running

tools.name: seameet_get_artifact
tools.description: Read AI artifacts: summary, transcription, action items, key decisions, chapters, OCR

tools.name: seameet_search_text
tools.description: Search across every recording's transcripts and summaries
